svg.title: Project Chrysalis narrative arc
svg.desc: Four-act escalation showing how gameplay mechanics shift from cooperative emergence to adversarial distributed systems battle while preserving the architect identity throughout.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Act I onboarding: first pod drop, basic harvest scripts, and early emergence moments.')

svg.text: Write basic logic → watch supply chains form

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Act II environmental hazards: magnetic anomalies, silicate traps, and soldier-drone logic.')

svg.text: Patch logic on the fly → distributed sacrifice patterns

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the Act III anomaly discovery: how does the player first notice the alien behavior in telemetry?')

svg.text: Diagnose drift, pheromone poison, false telemetry

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Design the silent Act IV ending: what does the merged swarm do that neither intelligence planned?')

svg.text: Merged swarm behaves as neither intelligence intended
mechanic constant throughout: write logic → observe behavior
